title: Made for Love
description: A record of gameplay videos, dance covers, fan videos, and other works made for love.
intro: Gameplay videos and derivative fan creations go here. Not assignments, not something made to turn in, but work that continues only because I genuinely like it.

featured.title: Human Construction Site
featured.description: The gameplay video and segmented playback are already connected here. Visitors can watch the full series directly on the site.

summary_card.title: Current gameplay entry

bullets: Implemented: on-site player, segmented switching, original-link fallback
Current content: full ending archive of Human Construction Site

cards.title: Reserved for more fan works
cards.description: Later, more works can be added by title: each can have its own detail page, left-side navigation, and material structure.
